name: ULTIMATE SWING GOLF by Clap Hanz

reviews.review_description: Is there a French version?

developer_response.body:
ご興味を持っていただきありがとうございます。
このAppは英語版と日本語版のみとなっております。
よろしくお願いします。

reviews.review_title: Must buy! My favorite golf game on VR!
reviews.review_description:
I’ve played many golf related games on VR. This one’s by far my favorite. 
It’s easy to get started.
Once you’re in it’s simple to play with friends.
The mechanics are great, driving feels perfect. Putting and chipping are fun.
Ive been playing for the past three days with friends and solo in the challenge mode unlocking clubs and courses. 
The things id say it needs to improve are simple things that wouldn’t affect the core game play.
I’d make an option to have your caddy be quiet or no caddy at all. Also add more customization to your avatar and to your clubs. 
Looking forward to seeing if they add more courses and other fun things. 
5/5 favorite golf game on VR!

developer_response.body:
この度は温かいレビューをお寄せいただきまして、誠にありがとうございます。 
楽しく遊んでくださっているとの内容、大変嬉しく拝見しました。

引き続き、弊社一同力をあわせて、皆さまにゴルフをお楽しみいただけるように精一杯努めてまいります。
今後とも『アルティメット スイング ゴルフ by クラップハンズ』をご愛顧くださいますよう、お願い申し上げます。

reviews.review_description:
First off this is literally 10% of the file size of the other popular "golf sim" on the quest store. 
Secondly, great feeling to the club strike and positioning but it really has this aesthetical feeling that it should really belong in an arcade hall right next to golden tee. 
Some of the UI can be intrusive at the intro to every shot, a customizing of the UI scale or position would have solved this minor issue. 
Challenge mode is a progressive tutorial  essentially while also able to "unlock" new content, and being only 2 courses when starting the game the challenge mode is essential to gain all the skills and content needed to join an online match. 
Leaderboards, challenges, and a pick up and play mood. 
Well worth a try.
Quite entertaining, time flies quick. Caddies are a nice touch.

developer_response.body: 楽しんでプレイをしてくれているという事で開発としてもとても喜ばしいです。キャディも気に入ってもらえて良かったです。いろんなキャディを連れて行ってみてください

reviews.review_description:
I was really enjoying the game but now for sine reason even though I have Uninstaller and reinstalled when goes to main screen it's just a bunch of overlapping circles and can not play game.
 I have purchased the game also.
 Please help

developer_response.body:
https://claphanz.com/product/usg/en.html
Please contact support via this URL and provide details about the situation.
Thank you for your cooperation.

reviews.review_description:
Great game I just dislike how you can’t edit a quick game like disable vacuum holes or adjust wind you get what you get and that’s it… Also online games don’t count towards your player grade - I play better when in competition and the fact the games don’t count towards my grade kind of takes the fun out of the online play 

As far as gameplay I like it a lot just wish the technical aspect was a little further along

reviews.review_description: I am so glad I came across this golf game from the best developers of fun golf games. I have been a big fan of clap hanz golf games ever since the first one I owned on the PSP. They capture the fun aspect of the game without taking it serious but the game plays so well that you take it serious. They have done a superb job on the VR golf and it looks great and plays so well. I really hope they release more courses on DLC or even release another full game, I will 100% purchase them.

reviews.review_title: Very Polished and a joy to play!
reviews.review_description: I think I enjoy this more than Golf+.  Really the only downside is that there are only 5 golf courses.  I wish the developer would release many different courses of various themes like spooky, laser future and so on.  Some of my favorite games continue to expand like walkabout mini golf, pinball FX VR.  Please let us buy more courses!  Thank you very much!  The only reason for 4 stars instead of 5, is we need more content.

reviews.review_description:
Developers 
You have the option for holes 
1-3
4-6
7-9
1-9
1-18
What about the back 9 of each course? Players are never going to see them, you would have to select 1-18 and play 9 holes just to get to the back 9, doesn't make sense please fix.
Apart from that other feedback.
Courses look great, plays well, had to turn music off and turn voice chat right down as the caddie gets irritating. There is no way to reset your ball position which really let's the game down. I'd also like to wander around the course while a player is taking their shot.
Please dont take this to negative the game is well done, with a few tweeks it could easily be better than golf+.
Also love the power bar practice thing, nice to have. Thumbs up

developer_response.body:

開発スタッフにも頂いたご意見は共有をさせて頂きます。

コメントからはとても楽しんでいただいている雰囲気を感じ取ることが出来ました!
今後とも楽しいゴルフをエンジョイしてください!!

reviews.review_description: One of the default characters is literally just Charlie kirk. Highly recommend

reviews.review_title: Probably my favourite VR golf game
reviews.review_description: I have played most VR golf games, USG is my favourite. It is a great arcade style golf game, especially with friends and family - it’s easy to learn, the challenges are a great tool at helping you learn and develop - not so serious/sim like as some of the others. Plus you don’t need to buy extra courses or pay a subscription 👍 I am really looking forward to the DLC for it.

reviews.review_description: I just redeemed this app as part of the Horizon+ subscription. I have played real golf for over 50 years and this allows you to get the thrill of golf right in your own home. The tutorials are great and informative to get you up to speed. I just ordered a golf club attachment for the controller and can't wait to explore this game in more detail. Highly recommend.

reviews.review_title: Everybody's Golf in all but name
reviews.review_description:
Great golf game that is easy to get into with the usual excellent colourful visuals and presentation from Clap Hanz. Like another user wrote very difficult to find on the Meta store on Quest as it does not show up when searching for it and when searching on PC if trial has been used the price does not show.

Please consider bringing the game to PSVR2 with multiplayer intact where it will be most certainly appreciated.

developer_response.body:
この度は温かいレビューをお寄せいただきまして、誠にありがとうございます。 
また、長期間クラップハンズのタイトルをプレイしていただきありがとうございます。
楽しく遊んでくださっているとの内容、大変嬉しく拝見しました。
頂きましたご意見は参考にさせていただきます。

ストアでの検索がうまく行かなかったという事でご迷惑をおかけいたしました。うまく検索が出来るように何かを変えてみます。

reviews.review_description: This is a great game with great graphics. But when I searched for golf on the Meta store it wasn't even listed. The only way I knew about was I was reading on the company Clap Handz and saw they made a game on Quest. I'm sure it would help people to know about this game if it came up under a golf search.

reviews.review_description: Oh man, I played Everybody's Golf on PSVR and always wished Clap Hanz would release another golf game in VR. I hadn't even realised this was released a year ago! Has that perfect early 2000s Japanese gaming 'blue sky' feel. Great sound and visuals and the golf is really fun. Have already gotten two friends to purchase to play with me. I'm curious if DLC is still planned as I saw the developers mention this in an interview around release but haven't see anything since...

reviews.review_description: I have fond memories of playing Hot Shots Golf 3 back in the day. This game was made by the same studio, and you can tell. As a person who doesn't play golf, and who didn't like the more realistic "simulator style" golf games available in VR, this game is perfect. It's nice to not have to swing with perfect proper form as if you were holding a real golf club. It's a really chill game, and it's great for people like me who don't actually know how to play golf. That's the downside of the "simulator style" golf games. If you're not good at golf in real life, you won't be good at those more realistic games, and that's not fun. This game is fun.

【ユーザーサポート】 https://claphanzusg.zendesk.com/hc/en-us

何卒よろしくお願い申し上げます。

reviews.review_description: I have golf vr mgw and probably all the golf games . They so lame compared to this one.  Please, can you make more courses.  We will buy them. Can u also have the camera follow or track ball in flight. Can we also move around the courses freely.  Excellent thank you.

reviews.review_description: This game is so much fun and very competitive when I play with my four friends. I wish y'all would explain how to enable whatever it is to do the long drive distance to get on the leader board. More courses plzzzzzzzzzzzz!

developer_response.body:
Thank you very much for taking the time to share such a warm review.
We are truly delighted to hear that you are enjoying the game.

The MR mode includes both "Putt Golf" and "Drive Battle," which are played in Mixed Reality.
While direct competition is not available, you can still compete online for driving distance.

Our entire team will continue to work together to ensure that everyone can enjoy the game of golf to the fullest.
We sincerely hope you will continue to support Ultimate Swing Golf by Clap Hanz in the future.

reviews.review_description: Molto divertente e con poche difficoltà che avrebbero inciso negativamente sul divertimento; il gioco incoraggia anche il profano con aiuti e incitazioni continue, quindi adatto anche a chi non è molto pratico di Golf; certo, non è una simulazione ai massimi livelli, ma per il costo contenuto e’ più che decente; peccato solo per la mancanza della lingua italiana, ma questa è una carenza di quasi tutte le app di oltre oceano.

reviews.review_description:
I purchased this game many months ago and  decided to get a refund. Primarily due to bugs and high price point. 

Yesterday, I saw this game in the store at a  lower price and it came with a  30 minute free trial.

I decided to try the game again and discovered a very pleasant bug free game.  My 30-minute trial went by fast as I was having a ball.  I quickly purchased the game and am very happy I did

My favorite part is the MR mode, but I like the VR portion as well

I am in 60 years old and enjoy a good game of VR / MR golf.  Especially at this price.  

Thanks, guys, for the price reduction and free trial!


Update 8_20_25

MR mode notworking.   Please  fix

developer_response.body:
この度は温かいレビューをお寄せいただきまして、誠にありがとうございます。 
楽しく遊んでくださっているとの内容、大変嬉しく拝見しました。
2025/4/2から価格改定を行っております。
VRもMRもおたのしみください！

reviews.review_description: I purchased the game and talked three other people into buying the game. We play Golf+ and of course, Walkabout. Ultimate Swing Golf is fun and doesn't take itself too seriously. I complete all 66 challenges, took me days. If the Devs created more courses, we would gladly purchase the DLC. Thanks for a fun golf co-op game.

reviews.review_description:
This game is from the legendary developers of the best arcade golf game originated on Playstation that released in 1997.

It got everything that you can expected from Hotshot Golf series, the great arcade golf gameplay mechanic, catchy soundtracks, charming with personality characters, and beautiful crafted golf courses. They have elevated to the new height with VR

I would love to thank these great developers for going the extra miles with VR and they did a great job while hopefully they will update the game and bring some dlc to the game.

If you want the best arcade golf game, this is definitely for you!

reviews.review_description: I was so fond of Hot Shots Golf: World Invitational on the PSP Vita.  And when I saw this game I couldn't wait to buy it.  To be able to be inside the environment I fell in love with over 13 years ago was an amazing experience.  I just completed the tutorial and I can't wait to keep going.  I hope more DLC is released in the future because I'd be eager to add to the experience.  Great job on the environment, I loved being able to move around in the lobby or walk up to my caddy, it made it feel so real.  Thank you!

developer_response.body:
この度は温かいレビューをお寄せいただきまして、誠にありがとうございます。 
楽しく遊んでくださっているとの内容、大変嬉しく拝見しました。
引き続き、弊社一同力をあわせて、皆さまにゴルフをお楽しみいただけるように精一杯努めてまいります。
今後とも『アルティメット スイング ゴルフ』をご愛顧くださいますよう、お願い申し上げます。

reviews.review_description: After years of playing all of the Clap Hanz golf games I was heartbroken when they disconnected the server for online play on PlayStation. The game itself was great but developing friendships and playing with the regular gang put it over the top (even though the online content had regressed). Hoping they eventually return tPlayStation I kept looking and ran across this game so decided to give it a shot. It’s a fun game but it lacks a lot when it comes to playing online. There’s no lobby for one so creating games with passwords is kind of moot. Where do you meet people to play with? The random online matchmaking is awful because there’s seemingly never anyone online to play with. Anyway there really needs to be a lobby, driving range in training, and hopefully they eventually return to PlayStation with the online content of years past. Hot Shots Out of Bounds was almost perfect.

developer_response.body:
この度は温かいレビューをお寄せいただきまして、誠にありがとうございます。 
楽しく遊んでくださっているとの内容、大変嬉しく拝見しました。
引き続き、弊社一同力をあわせて、皆さまにゴルフをお楽しみいただけるように精一杯努めてまいります。
オンラインロビーについてはなかなか難しい事もありますが検討をしてみます。
今後とも『アルティメット スイング ゴルフ』をご愛顧くださいますよう、お願い申し上げます。

reviews.review_description: Originally a 5 stars until I see one of the caddies outfits.

developer_response.body: 本製品をお楽しみいただけなかったとのこと、申し訳ございません。 いただいた内容は真摯に受け止め、お客様のご期待に応えられるように、努力してまいります。 この度は貴重なレビューをいただきまして、誠にありがとうございました。

reviews.review_description: This game is TERRIBLE (even when I use my gold stick accessory), especially when I simultaneously bought Golf+ and can compare the two games side by side. Golf+ is a refined product; it works, it makes sense and it is fun to play because of the attention to detail. ON THE OTHER HAND, Ultimate Swing Golf is a useless waste of money; the game is a TOY by comparison - and not a good toy - it is equivalent to buying a toy from the local markets, and when you open the box, its some cheap plasticky knock-off that is not worth toucing, let alone actually playing. Let me give you one example - the CONCEPT OF POWER - HOW COULD THEY HAVE MADE IT THIS BAD ?!?!?! It literally makes the game unplayable !!! Please - if you value your time and desire to have fun (and not be made fun of), do not chose this game. Spend your money elsewhere.

developer_response.body:
本製品をお楽しみいただけなかったとのこと、申し訳ございません。
いただいた内容は真摯に受け止め、お客様のご期待に応えられるように、努力してまいります。 
この度は貴重なレビューをいただきまして、誠にありがとうございました。

reviews.review_description: A good game from the excellent Everybody's Golf people but disappointed that despite setting the spatial data correctly it won't allow the MR mode.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your review.
We apologize for the inconvenience regarding the MR Play.
Please follow this link for game support:
https://claphanzusg.zendesk.com/hc/en-us
We appreciate your continued support for ULTIMATE SWING GOLF.

reviews.review_description:
Pros
- Nice courses, graphics and sounds
- Easy to play
- It's got that great Hot Shots look and feel
- Load time between holes isn't too long
- Very comfortable. Won't make you sick.

Cons
- Lots of loading. It would be nice if you could choose your next course or activity from the end of your last one and skip the lobby. You are constantly loading into the lobby just to load the next course. They could cut loading in half with this change as you would not need to load the lobby.

- UI elements like dialogs and notifications are displayed stuck to your face. This is a no-no in VR. Nothing should ever be stuck to a person's face. This feels really bad. Please fix it! 

- Loading screen overlays are jerky and need performance work. It's strange because the picture in the background is smooth but the text layer floating on top seems to be trying to track with your head, but it moves at 2 frames per second. Needs polish.

- Club lengths can't be set per club in settings. It needs to remember your club lengths per club. Something feels off here. Very clunky. Auto detection would be nice. 

- Camera positioning is often poor. When showing your drive coming in, the ball will often land behind you causing you to have to turn around. This then leaves you in the wrong position for your next shot.

- Early in the tutorial, the NPCs need a skip button. The lobby tutorials are too slow and usually not needed, yet you are forced to listen before the UI and pointer will enable. Consider removing most of these tutorials or put them in a "help" button for those that need them. The lobby UI is self-explanatory.

- The settings button is awkward having to be closed after changing a setting. It should automatically close after changing club length at a minimum. I couldn't even find the settings button at first as it is located on the ground and you tap it with you club, but this didn't match the instructions which show you pressing the controller trigger.  I'd prefer a press-and-hold or a stick click to open the settings.

- Caddy is way too chatty.
 
- Power of how hard you hit the ball feels all wrong. It takes very little to make the ball go very far. Might need to be adjustable. Or have a meter of some kind.

- I'll say it again because if they only fixed one thing it should be this. Get those dialogs and graphics off my face. They block your view and are highly annoying. Put them near your caddy's shoulder, or by the scoreboard, but remove them from my face!

Wishlist

- Japanese language voice option with optional English subtitles over their heads or in a speech bubble. I'm guessing the Japanese voices already exist, but it would be nice to be able to download them in a pack and turn them on. ありがとう！

Big fan of the Hot Shots franchise and glad to see it make an appearance on Quest. I'm having a lot of fun going through the challenges and appreciate all the unlockables.

Definitely needs some quality of life fixes. Ability to recenter on your ball is kind of baffling to be absent. The sensitivity on short shots and putting is way off. Feels like you're swacking a ping pong ball. I'd also like to see a legitimate AI versus mode included on freeplay. Very puzzling not to have the option.

Again, I really do enjoy the game despite my complaints and hope for some updates to get the game up to one of the best on the platform.

Edit: Developers have addressed the sensitivity issues and the game is now much better. Thank you.

Confirmed that there is no support for golf club controller attachments. After I read that one user said there was support I bought the game could find no such support and confirmed with the developer that there is definitely no support. 

In my opinion, club support is mandatory for golf games these days so this is a non starter for me. Otherwise the game looks like a nice midpoint between Walkabout and Golf+. I suppose I'll just have to wait for Walkabout Links.

developer_response.body:
レビューをいただきまして、誠にありがとうございます。 
この度Ver.1.0.8をリリースし、アタッチメントを付けたコントローラーとゲーム内のクラブの位置を調整する機能を追加しました。
よろしければ、お試しをご検討いただけますと幸いです。
今後とも『アルティメット スイング ゴルフ』をご愛顧くださいますよう、お願い申し上げます。

reviews.review_title: This is excellent. A triple-A golf game.
reviews.review_description:
Finally, a FUN and COLOURFUL golf game for the Meta Quest that doesn't take itself too seriously and offers nigh-on endless replayability. The game is basically "Everybody's golf VR 2" and adds in multiplayer (4 players at once), many single player challenges and some free play and MR modes.
I would say the game is a bit more challenging than the previous VR game in the series, as you'll have to play quite well to beat some of the computer opponents. They're also a slight disappointment as, so far, I've not been able to play a full round against any of them. It'd be good to just be able to pick a course, pick the holes and play rather than having to get to a particular part of the single player mission structure before you're allowed to face an AI opponent (and, even then, it's only been over 3 holes so far). I'm sure this might well open up, as I've yet to complete all the single player content, BUT it'd be nice to just be able to set up a VS game with AI instead of having to rely on human opponents if you want to do 9/18 holes. 

Also, I am disabled and it'd be good if the 2nd controller could be used for turning, as being able to turn my head 180 without trying to turn myself into an owl would be great.

One final strange thing is that your avatar has no legs, HOWEVER I did see a YouTube review of the game where the player DID have legs, both ingame and when shown on the little plinth inside the reception area. I don't understand how they did this, as I see no option to enable them which is really weird.

Anyway, if you're looking for a fun and addictive golfing experience that has 5 courses (3 of which you must unlock through playing the game) and a plethora of options and unlockables then this will fit the bill admirably. It's a great looking game, very SEGA in style, as if Golf and Outrun had a baby, and it's a really nice environment to be in. The chirpy caddies and AI opponents also make the world feel fun and friendly.

developer_response.body:
レビューをいただきまして、誠にありがとうございます。 
いただいたご要望のうち、下半身につきましては、この度Ver.1.0.8をリリースし、対応いたしました。よろしければ、お試しをご検討いただけますと幸いです。
今後とも『アルティメット スイング ゴルフ』をご愛顧くださいますよう、お願い申し上げます。

reviews.review_description:
This game is a lot of fun.  As a huge fan of Walkabout, I also enjoyed Golf+ but sometimes you want full swing golf in a more casual package...  USG hits that mark.  

Rendering each hole individually allows for a really beautiful presentation.  The touches like your caddy reacting to your shots, and various wildlife in the grass sometimes even landing on your ball, really adds to the immersion.

BUT the game really needs a power setting, especially for putting. The putting is so sensitive that you'll only ever swing your controller slow-very slow.  This makes it very frustrating to dial in the correct strength as the smallest increase in swing speed will have a huge effect on the ball speed...  It also feels like you are putting on smooth concrete the speed the ball moves...

USG could also benefit from reproducing the ball centering and practice shot options from Walkabout.  It would be really nice if the ball was always located in the same spot in my play area.  And I'd love to see the option to swing through the ball for practice shots when the grip trigger is held, rather than having to physically step away from the ball.

developer_response.body:
ご連絡ありがとうございます。 
いただいたご要望のうち、パワー感度調整につきましては、この度Ver.1.0.5をリリースし、対応いたしました。よろしければ、お試しをご検討いただけますと幸いです。
今後とも『アルティメット スイング ゴルフ』をご愛顧くださいますよう、お願い申し上げます。

reviews.review_description: Where to start a mix between arcade and serious golf the challenge is there if you want it .but first the graphics are stunning it's bright colourful and a very positive game , play it you'll see what i mean , had a rough day , play this I promise you'll be cheered up , staying on the graphics the small details are top notch , from a plane flying above you to a butterfly landing on your ball , this also has light rpg mechanics going on , always levelling up and something to strive for .this has 5 courses which isn't bad but I do hope for dlc courses in the future .this is a showcase for the quest 3 this is what it can do , I don't say this lightly but straight into my top 3 games , i my opinion a must buy , you will love this , stunning, oh nearly forgot the most important thing the golf play is very accurate and responsive. Now back to the first tee 👍

I've been a fan since Hot Shots Golf 2 on PSP.  This version looks amazing on Quest, but can be very frustrating.

- Hitting the ball is janky.  I am not a real golfer and CAN'T swing the same way twice.  Whether I hit a successful shot or not is pure luck and it's not fun at all.  I want to play a video game, not a simulator.
- Wish I could see my character swinging and customize it like in the other games, don't care that it wouldn't be first person.  
- The UI only let's you see one challenge at a time, if you can't beat it or you don't like it, well, you can't progress.
- Some UI elements tilt with your head which looks pretty bad in a 2024 title.

I'll probably give it a few more hours to try and get better at swinging but not looking forward to it.

This is a very nice alternative to some other full swing golf games for the Quest; most notably the outstanding Golf+.  Ultimate Swing Golf includes all the elements you would expect including single player with multiple courses (I believe four), room codes to play online with friends and the ability to get in random matches.  There is a decent amount of tutorials and instructions to get you going.  It feels just slightly cartoony and a bit casual but in a nice way.  There are some great touches like a crowd that jumps out of the way of errant balls and cheers when you raise your club.  The graphics look really good and I am enjoying the game play quite a bit.  If you have played any of the excellent PSP or PS Vita golf games by Clap Hanz like I have, then you should know what to expect.

The main feature missing for me so far is the ability to view a replay of a shot.  Also, it would be nice to be able to teleport around the course rather then just view things from your ball location using the ground and “god mode” cameras; perhaps as a minimum adding a view from the cup back to your ball would be helpful.

I do hope the developers are successful with this version and add additional content.  I would be happy to buy extra courses as DLC.  Whether that happens or not, this is a lot of fun and highly recommended for golf fans!

Someone messaged me “REPLAYS are in the game.  Press B before triggering your next shot for a replay. You can toggle views using A as well. If you keep pressing B it also changes the angle a bit each time.“

A further update after more play:

The networking code needs to provide for some resilience.  We have not found a way to rejoin an online room after a networking dropout.  This capability is essential for online play!

Classic arcade golf Hot Shots feel and look from the consoles.
Luscious, vibrant color for the courses and plenty to do from custom 18 holes to mixed reality putting game.
Great fulfilling golf game.

reviews.review_title: Great gameplay but rough on Q3
reviews.review_description: This is a great balance of arcade and sim and very well made however it does look low resolution and rough for the Quest 3. Really hope for an update to polish it up!
After 5 minutes I waved to club the caddy and receptionist with a nine iron.

I know it's more of an arcade game than an actual golf sim but the swing mechanics feel highly inconsistent and as a real life amateur golfer it's pretty frustrating.

Golf club attachment support would help, too.

It's too bad because it would be a great game otherwise. Production values are through the roof but poor swing mechanics in a golf game, arcadey or not, is kind of a deal breaker.

Hopefully they keep working on it but I won't hold my breath...

developer_response.body:
ご連絡ありがとうございます。 
いただいたご要望のうち、パワー感度調整につきましては、この度Ver.1.0.5をリリースし、対応いたしました。よろしければ、お試しをご検討いただけますと幸いです。
今後とも『アルティメット スイング ゴルフ』をご愛顧くださいますよう、お願い申し上げます。

reviews.review_description:
Behind the charming aesthetics and characters hides away absolute terrible game design.

The game is in need of constant recentering. Adjust the angle of your shot? Hold B for 3 seconds. 
You moved a little in between your shots? Recenter with the meta button. Switching from iron to putter? Recenter again.

There's a practice swing mechanic built in to gauge power and angles, except you will never replicate any practice swing. 
More often that not the ball will veer left/right because you twisted a micrometer during the swing, or the controller tracking wasn't accurate enough.
You can work around it if you're willing to sink 50hrs into practicing and going by feel, but then what's the goddamn point of helpers?
Woods and iron need to be swung at angles to for the shots to go straight while a putter is intuitive to use.

Putting is absolute garbage, not because the ball doesn't go in the direction you want, but the power setting is the absolute worst I've ever experienced.
It's HYPER sensitive and you will never get the correct amount of power. It's a wonder if the devs have played Walkabout Minigolf at all, and if they did then an insult to all their customer to make such terrible putting mechanics.

All the unlockables are tied to singleplayer. If it was only caddie's outfits then I wouldn't care. But you unlock straight upgrades for clubs that lets you shoot way farther than the default one.

Now the actual reason why I'm making this review is the multiplayer. Organizing a game between people is an absolute nightmare.
You need to know the map, holes, and exactly the exact amount of people who will show up. Once in the lobby you cannot change any settings at all. Basically wasting everyone's time. There's no hotjoining ongoing games. 

EDIT: Devs added 18 holes in MP and some basic power management per club but it doesn't really fix the issues. They're trying at least.

developer_response.body:
本製品をお楽しみいただけていないご状況とのこと、申し訳ございません。
この度いただきました多岐にわたる貴重な内容を、真摯に受け止め、お客様のご期待に応えられるように努力してまいります。 
また何か気になる点等がございましたら、お気軽にご報告ください。
レビューをいただきまして、誠にありがとうございました。

reviews.review_title: Fun game with lots of features
reviews.review_description:
Fun game with nice graphics and game play. Wanted a golf game that was not necessarily realistic/serious but fun and light hearted. This game fits that bill perfectly. 
You don't have to just play a round of golf. There are fun challenges that help you practice various golf skills and multiple beautiful courses. When you complete challenges you earn new clubs, caddies, outfits, etc. Caddies give tips and words of encouragement and crowd reactions are fun as well. You are able to customize your game as well.  I have not tried the multi player mode yet, but it supports up to 4 people.
The putting is way more sensitive than I expected (way faster than the always fun Mini Golf game), not sure if there is a way to adjust it yet.  Highly recommended!

developer_response.body:
ご連絡ありがとうございます。 
この度Ver.1.0.5をリリースし、パワーの感度が調整できる機能を追加いたしました。よろしければ、お試しをご検討いただけますと幸いです。
今後とも『アルティメット スイング ゴルフ』をご愛顧くださいますよう、お願い申し上げます。

reviews.review_description:
This game has a very unique charme to it, and is distinctly japanese in a good way.

It feels like a sega arcade game from the 2000's, very bright and cheerfull.

I also think that the stylized 2d crowds are a nice touch. And the character models of the various caddies are very expressive and look downright amazing.

Great music and physics, too. I can't wrap my head around how this does not have 5stars throughout.
I guess some people are turned of by the slight stylization of the visuals. But to me this looks worlds better than something like golf+,  which tries to look photo-realistic on limited quest hardware and ends up missing the mark.

If you have enjoyed any japanese sports games of the Playstation2/Gamecube era (or the PS3/Wii era for that matter), you will love this!

developer_response.body:
この度は温かいお言葉をいただきまして、誠にありがとうございます。 
引き続き弊社一同力をあわせて、皆さまにお楽しみいただけるように努めてまいりますので、何かお気づきの点等がございましたら、お気軽にご報告ください。
今後とも『アルティメット スイング ゴルフ』をご愛顧くださいますよう、お願い申し上げます。

reviews.review_description: The game definitely reminds me of the PlayStation versions of Hot Shots golf. There are currently some bugs in the game that need to be fixed (like not being able to select menu). Mixed Reality mode is pretty cool, especially putting in your own room. Is this better than the other golf main stays on the platform? No, but it's a fun alternative.

The putting needs some changes. It’s waaaay too sensitive. It’s like putting a ping pong ball on ice. Also, it would be nice to be able to use a club attachment. For now, I’m saying 3 stars. The game has potential.

developer_response.body:
ご連絡ありがとうございます。 
この度Ver.1.0.5をリリースし、パワーの感度が調整できる機能を追加いたしました。よろしければ、お試しをご検討いただけますと幸いです。
今後とも『アルティメット スイング ゴルフ』をご愛顧くださいますよう、お願い申し上げます。

reviews.review_description: It really is awesome. Sorry golf+, I’m gong to be busy for a while.

This is a great golf game for non golfers & golfers alike. A nice balance between arcade & sims, there is a ton to do in single player but really shines in multiplayer. Really hoping this game is successful on the Quest so that we can get future DLC
Got basically the same bug that the others reported too. Tried to contact the support. It leads to a website that hasn´t been touched by any supporters for 2 years.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your review.
You may have visited the support page for another title.
Please follow this link for this game:
https://claphanzusg.zendesk.com/hc/en-us

Also, we have released update 1.0.0 which fixes this issue.
We apologize for the inconvenience.
https://claphanzusg.zendesk.com/hc/en-us/articles/32706837645337

reviews.review_description: Fun arcade style golf game, a refreshing change from the other ones currently on vr!

Just a fun, challenging, charming game of golf by a top tier developer. It looks and runs great, and the controls are sensitive without ruining the more casual or arcade nature of the presentation. I am hopeful for downloadable content, such as new courses and characters, but even in its current state, I feel that it is easily worth the asking price.

Now for the suggestion: why not allow the player to walk the course by swinging one or two of the controllers, to simulate the experience of enjoying the sights and sounds of the course. It would add a bit more motion and exercise to the game as well. Just a thought😀

reviews.review_title: Some asap fixes needed... could be great
reviews.review_description: The caddy and audience should be able to be toggled on/off.  The caddies are awful, talk so much, and will say nice shot no matter what you do.  I get that they were trying to give the game some personality, but it's really distracting to have to listen to them (or wait until they stop talking if you mute the voices).  They stand a few feet away from your ball, lol... go away please!  As other reviews have stated, power is odd for shorter shots and putts.  Learnable but off.

developer_response.body:
レビューをいただきまして、誠にありがとうございます。 
この度Ver.1.0.8をリリースし、ギャラリーの「表示/非表示」選択と、キャディ配置の「近い/遠い」選択ができるようになりました。よろしければ、お試しをご検討いただけますと幸いです。
今後とも『アルティメット スイング ゴルフ』をご愛顧くださいますよう、お願い申し上げます。
